title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What are you saying?? We're not strangers!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: You're really a good person. I'm surprised.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Even then, I cannot tell you that.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yohoho!! Let's have a happy sea song!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: This is what caused the Vibra- Tions!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: But today was a lucky day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: My heart's desire was full- filled!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wow! His body is so light!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #4, Whitebeard, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.
